form_analysis.form_header_text: Rep. Don Davis (NC-01) Fiscal Year (FY) 2027 Appropriations Requests Form
form_analysis.form_instructions_text: This form will collect Fiscal Year 2027 appropriations requests for North Carolina's First Congressional District (programmatic, bill language, and report language requests). If you have multiple requests, please submit a separate form for each request. A separate submission form for Community Project Funding (CPF) requests is posted and available on our website under the FY2027 Requests dropdown menu. This form is for programmatic, bill, and report language requests only. Our deadline for appropriations requests is 5:00 PM EST on Monday March 9, 2026. Please reach out to Delia Kashat (delia.kashat@mail.house.gov), Nathaniel Dullea (Nathaniel.Dullea@mail.house.gov), or Jonathan Miller (Jonathan.Miller@mail.house.gov), with any questions or concerns that you might have.

sections.description: Information about the organization and person making the request.

fields.label: Requesting Organization or Entity:
fields.help_text: Full name of the organization or entity submitting the request.

fields.label: Point of Contact (Name only):
fields.help_text: Name of the primary contact person.

fields.label: Contact Email:
fields.help_text: Email address for the point of contact.

fields.label: Contact Phone Number:
fields.help_text: Phone number for the point of contact.

fields.label: Please describe your organization's ties to NC-01:
fields.help_text: Explain the connection between the requesting organization and North Carolina's 1st district.

sections.description: Specifics regarding the type of appropriation request being made.

fields.label: Type of request:
fields.help_text: Specify if this is programmatic, bill language, or report language.
fields.rationale: The request context explicitly identifies this as a programmatic funding request for the Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Corresponding Appropriations Subcommittee:
fields.help_text: Select the subcommittee that oversees this request.
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development, and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
State, Foreign Operations, and Related Programs
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: The NASA Science Mission Directorate falls under the jurisdiction of the CJS subcommittee as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Agency or Title:
fields.help_text: The relevant federal agency or bill title.
fields.rationale: The request is for NASA as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Bureau:
fields.help_text: The relevant bureau within the agency.
fields.rationale: The Science Mission Directorate (SMD) is the relevant bureau/account within NASA for this request.

fields.label: Account:
fields.help_text: The specific appropriations account.
fields.rationale: 'Science' is the specific appropriations account for the Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Program/Language Title:
fields.help_text: The title of the program or language request.
fields.rationale: This is the short title for the programmatic funding request for NASA's Science account.

fields.label: Program Element (PE) and Line Number (For Defense Requests Only)
fields.help_text: Only required for Defense-related requests.
fields.rationale: This is a non-defense request for the Commerce, Justice, Science (CJS) bill; therefore, PE and Line Numbers do not apply.

fields.label: Proposal Rationale: Please explain how your request directly or indirectly benefits North Carolina's First congressional district (1000 character limit)
fields.help_text: Detailed justification for why this funding is needed in NC-01.
fields.draft_value:
* Direct local economic impact through aerospace supply chain partners like PCB Piezotronics of North Carolina, Inc., which received $35,738 in NASA Science contracts
* Economic multiplier effect where every $1 invested in NASA returns approximately $3 to the economy, driving industrial demand and high-tech innovation
* Maintenance of U.S. global leadership and competitive edge against China's rapid space expansion, ensuring American-led norms for 21st-century exploration
* Vital support for the STEM talent pipeline, providing the inspiration and technical challenges that build North Carolina's future aerospace and technology workforce
fields.rationale: The response cites the specific local contract recipient (PCB Piezotronics of North Carolina, Inc.) and the exact contract amount ($35,738) from the provided NASA spending context for NC-01. It also integrates strategic advocacy talking points regarding the economic multiplier and international competition.

fields.label: Bill language (if required):
fields.help_text: Specific text for legislative language requests.
fields.rationale: The request context specifies that no bill language is being requested for this programmatic funding increase.

sections.description: Details about funding levels and coordination with other offices.

fields.label: Funding Action
fields.help_text: Desired outcome for the funding level.
fields.rationale: The advocacy goal is to support a specific top-line funding level of $9 billion for the NASA Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Specify funding level (if applicable):
fields.help_text: The dollar amount requested for FY2027.
fields.rationale: This reflects the exact funding ask for NASA's Science Mission Directorate provided in the reference values.

fields.label: Is another office leading this request? If so, name Member and office's point of contact.
fields.help_text: Coordination with other Congressional offices.
fields.draft_value: Yes, Reps. Don Bacon and Judy Chu.
fields.rationale: The reference context identifies an existing House letter led by Reps. Bacon and Chu.

fields.label: If another office is not leading this request, are you asking Rep. Davis to lead a multi-Member letter?
fields.help_text: Request for the Representative to lead a programmatic letter.
fields.rationale: The reference values state that the member is not being asked to lead a multi-member letter as one already exists.

fields.label: Was this request included in the President's FY27 Budget Request?
fields.help_text: Specify if the program was in the administration's budget proposal.
options: This request is being submitted prior to the release of the President's Budget
fields.draft_value: This request is being submitted prior to the release of the President's Budget
fields.rationale: The SMD Topline Funding History indicates that the FY2027 President's Budget Request has not yet been released.

fields.label: If included in the President's Budget, what was the amount requested?
fields.help_text: Amount specified in the administration's FY27 budget proposal.
fields.rationale: The reference values state that the FY2027 President's Budget Request has not yet been released.
